query: Write a guide for how to rotate an expired API token before the next deploy
We need a getting-started tutorial that walks a brand-new user through deploying their first project
Add a reference page documenting every flag the CLI accepts
Write an explanation of why our sessions are cookie-based rather than token-based
Document how an operator configures SSO — write the how-to
Create a new tutorial for setting up the local dev environment from scratch
We need user-facing docs for the bulk-export feature — write a guide
Draft a reference page for the config-file format and its fields
Write a how-to for migrating data between two workspaces
Write a new explanation page about how our caching model works
Write a spec for the new CSV export feature before we build it
Record the decision to store our guides in Markdown instead of reStructuredText
Draft a proposal to reorganize how we structure our documentation
Document how the build pipeline is wired for contributors working on the codebase
Update the existing installation how-to to mention the new --force flag
Add docstrings to the exporter module so the API is documented
Write the release notes for the 2.0 release
Fix the broken link in the installation guide
Write the empty-state and error microcopy for the upload screen
Write a blog post announcing our new export feature
